message:
fix: remove unused imports and suppress unused function warnings in tests

- e2e_migration_quality_gate: remove unused ArtifactContract, MigrationStep,
  StepVerification, SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1, SurfaceDisposition, standard_surface_entries
- proptest_canary_rehearsal: prefix unused arb_drill_step with _
- proptest_soak_confidence_gate: prefix unused arb_cell_result with _
- proptest_migration_rehearsal: prefix unused arb_scenario_result with _
- proptest_ntm_decommission: prefix unused arb_gate_check and arb_doc_entry with _

`cargo check -p frankenterm-core --tests` now produces 0 errors, 0 warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
